description: Canonical CashTime taxonomy corpus. Indexed into Vertex AI Search for grounding the research sub-agent. Each document is one taxonomy entry. The research agent must only emit `enum` values that appear here.

documents.title: Art & Design
documents.text: Visual artists, illustrators and designers. Design-led, aesthetically driven audiences who value craft and originality.

documents.title: Beauty & Cosmetics
documents.text: Makeup artists, skincare and cosmetics reviewers. High-conversion product audiences.

documents.title: Books & Literature
documents.text: Book reviewers, BookTok and Bookstagram creators, literary commentators. Readers 25-45 who value craft over bestseller hype. Strong fit for publishing, audiobook and subscription brands.

documents.title: Business & Entrepreneurship
documents.text: Founders, operators and business commentators. B2B-leaning audiences for SaaS, tooling and professional services.

documents.title: Career & Professional
documents.text: Career coaches, recruiters and workplace commentators. Strong for ed-tech, hiring and upskilling brands.

documents.title: Comedy & Humor
documents.text: Comedians and meme creators. Broad-reach, high-engagement entertainment audiences.

documents.title: Crypto & Web3
documents.text: Crypto and web3 commentators, traders and builders. Risk-tolerant fintech-adjacent audiences.

documents.title: DIY & Crafts
documents.text: Makers and craft creators. Hands-on hobbyist audiences.

documents.title: Education & Learning
documents.text: Educators and study creators. Direct fit for ed-tech, language apps and online courses.

documents.title: Entertainment
documents.text: Pop-culture and entertainment creators. Broad consumer reach.

documents.title: Family & Parenting
documents.text: Parenting and family creators. Trusted advisor audiences for consumer and household brands.

documents.title: Fashion & Style
documents.text: Fashion and style creators. High-intent shopping audiences.

documents.title: Finance & Investing
documents.text: Personal-finance and investing creators. High-value fintech audiences (note: funded-account gating common).

documents.title: Food & Cooking
documents.text: Food and cooking creators. Strong for CPG, kitchenware and delivery brands.

documents.title: Gaming
documents.text: Gamers and streamers. Young, highly engaged audiences for games, hardware and energy brands.

documents.title: Health & Fitness
documents.text: Fitness coaches and health creators. Note: medical/health professionals classify as HEALTH_FITNESS, not CAREER. Strong for supplements, apparel and app brands.

documents.title: Home & Interior
documents.text: Home and interior creators. Aspirational shopping audiences for furniture and decor.

documents.title: LGBTQ+
documents.text: LGBTQ+ community creators. Values-aligned, loyal audiences.

documents.title: Lifestyle
documents.text: Lifestyle and vlog creators. Versatile general-consumer audiences.

documents.title: Luxury
documents.text: Luxury and premium-goods creators. Affluent, high-spend audiences.

documents.title: Marketing & Social Media
documents.text: Marketers and content strategists. B2B SaaS and tooling fit.

documents.title: Men's Grooming
documents.text: Men's grooming and style creators. Targeted male consumer audiences.

documents.title: Music
documents.text: Musicians and music creators. Passionate fan audiences for instruments, software and streaming.

documents.title: News & Politics
documents.text: News and political commentators. Engaged, opinionated audiences (brand-safety sensitive).

documents.title: Outdoors & Adventure
documents.text: Outdoor and adventure creators. Gear-buying, experience-driven audiences.

documents.title: Pets & Animals
documents.text: Pet and animal creators. Devoted audiences for pet-care and CPG brands.

documents.title: Photography & Film
documents.text: Photographers and filmmakers. Gear and software audiences.

documents.title: Productivity
documents.text: Productivity and tooling creators. High fit for SaaS and app brands.

documents.title: Real Estate
documents.text: Real-estate creators. High-value, high-intent audiences.

documents.title: Science
documents.text: Science communicators. Curious, educated audiences.

documents.title: Spirituality & Mindfulness
documents.text: Spirituality and mindfulness creators. Loyal, intention-driven audiences.

documents.title: Sports
documents.text: Sports creators and athletes. Large, passionate fan bases.

documents.title: Sustainability & Eco
documents.text: Sustainability creators. Values-driven, conscious-consumer audiences.

documents.title: Technology
documents.text: Tech reviewers, developers and OSS maintainers. Strong fit for SaaS, dev-tools and gadget brands.

documents.title: Travel
documents.text: Travel creators. Aspirational, high-spend audiences for travel and lifestyle brands.

documents.title: Vegan & Plant-Based
documents.text: Vegan and plant-based creators. Mission-driven food and CPG audiences.

documents.title: Wellness & Mental Health
documents.text: Wellness and mental-health creators. Trusted, sensitive audiences for health and app brands.

documents.title: Automotive
documents.text: Automotive creators. Enthusiast, high-consideration audiences.

documents.title: Dance & Performance
documents.text: Dance and performance creators. High-energy, trend-setting audiences.

documents.title: Nonprofit & Activism
documents.text: Nonprofit and activism creators. Values-aligned, action-oriented audiences.

documents.title: Instagram
documents.text: Visual-first platform; strong for beauty, fashion, food, books (Bookstagram), lifestyle.

documents.title: YouTube
documents.text: Long-form video; strong for tech, education, gaming, reviews, deep-dive content.

documents.title: TikTok
documents.text: Short-form viral platform; strong for books (BookTok), comedy, beauty, trends.

documents.title: Substack
documents.text: Newsletter platform; strong for writers, business, finance, literary creators.

documents.title: Spotify
documents.text: Audio platform; strong for podcasters and musicians.

documents.title: Apple Podcasts
documents.text: Podcast platform; audio-first audiences.

documents.title: X (Twitter)
documents.text: Real-time commentary; strong for tech, crypto, business, news, marketing.

documents.title: LinkedIn
documents.text: Professional network; strong for B2B, career, business, marketing creators.

documents.title: Twitch
documents.text: Live-streaming platform; strong for gaming and live creators.

documents.title: GitHub
documents.text: Developer platform; strong for OSS maintainers and dev-tools audiences.

documents.title: Literary & warm
documents.text: Literary, warm, slightly bookish, never hype. Fits books, publishing, slow-living brands.

documents.title: Playful & witty
documents.text: Playful, witty, casual. Fits comedy, gaming, youth consumer brands.

documents.title: Authoritative & expert
documents.text: Authoritative, credible, data-driven. Fits B2B, finance, health, tech.

documents.title: Aspirational & premium
documents.text: Aspirational, premium, refined. Fits luxury, fashion, travel.

documents.title: Energetic & high-energy
documents.text: Energetic, bold, punchy. Fits gaming, sports, fitness, youth brands.

documents.title: Empathetic & supportive
documents.text: Empathetic, supportive, gentle. Fits wellness, mental health, parenting, nonprofit.

documents.title: Minimalist & clean
documents.text: Minimalist, clean, understated. Fits design, productivity, premium tech.
